name: GMK Striker
subtitle: Football-inspired WoB with vivid green accents
description: GMK Striker brings the energy of the stadium to your desk. Designed by biip, this set features a classic black base with vivid green accent keys inspired by football kits worldwide.

name: GMK Botanical
subtitle: Nature-inspired greens and warm creams
description: GMK Botanical is a nature-themed set with calming greens and warm cream tones. Units are now available in stock from selected vendors.

name: GMK Red Samurai
subtitle: Dark base with bold crimson modifiers
description: GMK Red Samurai is currently shipping from the factory. Orders placed during the group buy are being fulfilled now.

name: GMK Arctic
subtitle: Ice blue and white — clean arctic vibes
description: GMK Arctic is currently in the Interest Check phase. Express your interest and help this set reach the minimum order quantity to launch.

name: GMK Laser
subtitle: Retro 80s purple and magenta
description: GMK Laser has fully delivered. Some vendors may still carry limited stock.

name: GMK Dracula
subtitle: Dark theme inspired by the Dracula color scheme
description: GMK Dracula brings the beloved dark coding theme to your keyboard. Deep greys and purples with precise legends inspired by the Dracula editor theme.

name: GMK Olive
subtitle: Military-inspired muted olive tones
description: GMK Olive features muted military tones with clean cream legends. Stock is available at select vendors.

name: GMK Serika R2
subtitle: Japanese-inspired neutrals — round 2
description: GMK Serika R2 brings back the beloved Japanese-inspired neutral colorway for a second run. Clean off-white with precise black legends.

name: GMK Futura
subtitle: Bauhaus-inspired geometric typography
description: GMK Futura draws from the iconic Bauhaus design movement with geometric letterforms and clean minimalist aesthetics.

name: GMK Moonrise
subtitle: Night sky gradient — cool blues and purples
description: GMK Moonrise captures the twilight gradient of a rising moon over the ocean. Still in interest check — show your support!
